# Source: Productlane

**URL:** https://productlane.com  
**Category:** Linear-native roadmap + changelog tool  
**Why it matters:** Purpose-built for teams using Linear. Turns Linear issues into a public roadmap and changelog with zero extra data entry.

## Feature set (as of 2026)

- **Linear-native integration** — connects directly to Linear workspace; maps Linear projects/cycles to roadmap items and changelog entries.
- **Public changelog page** — autogenerated from completed Linear issues; configurable visibility per project.
- **In-app widget** — embeddable changelog with unread badge.
- **Roadmap portal** — public/private roadmap linked to Linear backlog.
- **GitHub integration** — can pull release notes from GitHub releases.
- **Custom domain** — included on paid plans.
- **Changelog editor** — enrich auto-drafted entries with screenshots, descriptions before publishing.

## Pricing (2026 approx.)

- **Free** — 1 portal, basic roadmap, up to 50 feedback posts.
- **Pro ~$49/mo** — custom domain, unlimited portals, email subscribers, advanced segmentation.

## Differentiation

The key differentiator vs Headway / Beamer: Productlane eliminates the changelog entry authoring step for Linear teams. A Linear issue moves to "Done" → Productlane drafts the entry → editor reviews and publishes. The human editing step remains; the data gathering step is automated.

## Weaknesses

- Only useful if the team already uses Linear.
- Changelog quality depends on Linear issue titles and descriptions; teams with poor hygiene get poor draft quality.
- No NPS / in-app survey component.

## Applicability

- `guides/01-tool-selection.md` — best for: Linear-native teams; strongest ROI for teams already maintaining Linear issue hygiene.
- `guides/02-tool-setup.md` — OAuth install from Productlane → Linear authorization.
